name: Mocha Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a saucepan, melt butter. Add brown sugar and stir until dissolved. Let mixture cool, then beat in egg at room temperature. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder together and add to butter-egg mixture alternately with the cold coffee. Blend in vanilla extract and stir in chocolate chips and nuts. Pour into a well-greased 9-inch baking pan. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cut into small squares. Yield: 2 1/2 to 3 dozen bars.
Note: For neater bar cookies, line the baking pan with foil before greasing. When the bars have finished baking, let them cool a few minutes in the pan. Flip the uncut bars onto a wire rack; remove the foil and let cool completely, then cut into squares. Bars will cut without ragged edges.
